title: Weather: Partly cloudy and cool on Wednesday for the Garden Route and Karoo
description: LOCAL NEWS - According to the latest weather...
bodyText:
LOCAL NEWS - According to the latest weather forecast from the South African Weather Service, you can expect partly cloudy to cloudy skies nationwide, with fog patches and isolated to scattered showers in some areas.

Here’s what you need to know.


> Regional forecast:


Western CapeCloudy over the western and southern parts in the morning with fog patches, otherwise partly cloudy from the afternoon, otherwise fine with high level clouds and cold to cool.

The wind along the coast will be light south-westerly along the south-western and south coasts in the morning, otherwise moderate south-easterly to easterly. The expected UVB sunburn index: Moderate

Western half of the Eastern CapeMorning fog in places over the interior, otherwise partly cloudy and cool with isolated showers and thundershowers in the east, but cloudy in places along the coast and adjacent interior.

The wind along the coast will be light north-westerly, becoming light to moderate south-easterly in the afternoon.

Eastern half of the Eastern CapePartly cloudy in places, otherwise cloudy and cool with isolated showers and thundershowers, but scattered in the north.

The wind along the coast will be light and variable, becoming light to moderate south-easterly from the afternoon, but north-easterly north of Mazeppa Bay from the evening.


> Temperatures on Wednesday:


‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
